summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RECRA Solutions CPQ Platform iteration 4. All requested features verified working: Drag & Drop, OPEX renamed to Operational Lease, Muntautomaat removed (22 products), Sanitair configuration in Step 5 with checkbox options, CAPEX/Lease display in sidebar, wizard navigation, category filter, canvas toolbar, and AI Layout Generator.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/products returns exactly 22 products (Muntautomaat removed)
Backend: No 'Muntautomaat' in product catalog
Backend: Sanitair category has 3 products
Backend: Douchelezer category has 3 products
Backend: All 8 categories exist (sanitair, slagboom, camera, wifi, verlichting, betaalsysteem, toegangscontrole, douchelezer)
Backend: Products have all required fields
Backend: Project CRUD operations work correctly
Backend: Quote calculation returns correct CAPEX/OPEX values
Backend: AI recommendations endpoint returns rule-based recommendations
Backend: PDF export generates HTML with 'Operational Lease' (not OPEX)
Frontend: RECRA branding colors correct - header #244628, background #FDF9ED
Frontend: All 5 wizard steps present (Project, Terrein, Producten, Energie, Offerte)
Frontend: Wizard navigation works across all steps
Frontend: AI Layout Generator button present in Step 2
Frontend: Canvas toolbar with Select and Zone tools present
Frontend: Category filter dropdown works with 9 options
Frontend: Sanitair products show 'vanaf' prefix on price
Frontend: Non-sanitair products don't have 'vanaf' prefix
Frontend: Drag & Drop from sidebar to canvas works correctly
Frontend: Right sidebar shows CAPEX and Lease/mnd labels
Frontend: Right sidebar has Offerte and AI Advies tabs
Frontend: Step 5 shows 'Operational Lease' (OPEX renamed correctly)
Frontend: Step 5 shows 'Sanitair Samenstellen' section when sanitair products placed
Frontend: Sanitair config has all 4 checkbox options (Extra douches, Familiecabine, Warmtepomp, Zonneboiler)
Frontend: PDF export button present in Step 5
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 4 verified working. Key changes tested: 1) Muntautomaat removed (22 products now), 2) OPEX renamed to 'Operational Lease' in Step 5 and PDF, 3) Sanitair configuration moved to Step 5 with checkbox options for Extra douches, Familiecabine, Warmtepomp, Zonneboiler. Drag & drop confirmed working. RECRA branding colors correct (#244628 header, #FDF9ED background, #70C26C accent).
